problem: Why do amyloid plaques form in Alzheimer's and can they be cleared?
mechanism: Viral vector delivery of therapeutic gene
hypothesis: If Viral vector delivery of therapeutic gene is applied to they, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Mouse model knockout study with 6 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
